features: EXTRA COMFORT & SAFETY: Experience ultimate comfort with our premium SwimCell 3-layer cotton reusable face mask, ensuring additional protection and a gentle touch on your skin. This cotton fabric face mask is machine washable and reusable, providing both durability and eco-friendliness. Say goodbye to standard disposable face covering masks with our superior washable face mask!

FILTER POCKET WITH 4 x PM2.5 FILTERS: Our reusable face masks meet WHO standards and government requirements. Whether you choose the colourful or black face mask set, we include 4 units of PM2.5 filters, adding an extra layer of defence for a total of 3 layers within the cotton mask. In addition, our cloth mask filters are KN95 certified, ensuring superior protection for your travels by train, aeroplane, or bus. Stock up on additional high-quality filters from our store.

ADJUSTABLE FIT: Say goodbye to discomfort with our cotton face masks featuring an adjustable nose wire, ideal for glasses wearers seeking a snug fit. The adjustable ear toggles in our reusable face mask, paired with rounded elastic, guarantee a personalised and comfortable wearing experience. Use the colourful or black mask with our soft silicone mask extender (available separately) for added relief from ear pressure.

TAILORED SIZES FOR EVERY AGE: Choose the perfect cotton face mask for you or your loved ones, with sizes available for both adults and children. Carefully follow our sizing guide to ensure an optimal fit, as adult face masks are not suitable for children. Our colourful and black face masks are designed to fit kids up to approximately age 10, with included instructions for easy adjustments.

PROUDLY BRITISH, EXCEPTIONAL QUALITY: As a UK-based company, we take pride in offering an exceptional range of top-quality travel products. Explore our selection, including additional PM2.5 filters and soft silicone face mask extenders tailored for adults and children, ensuring your safety and comfort wherever you go.
description: Product description SwimCell 3 Layer Face Masks. Pack of 2 with 4 x PM 2.5 Filters What Do You Get? 2 x professionally made 3 layer, 100% cotton face masks Insert pocket for filters. Adjustable nose wire. Rounded ear elastic for extra comfort. Adjustable ear toggles. 4 x PM 2.5 filters included. No exhale vent Reusable ziplock storage bag. Instructions, information and warning leaflet. Choose From 2 Sizes of Face Masks Adult- 24 x 11cm. For Men and Women All adults with smaller faces should still choose the adult mask. Just follow the simple instructions for adding a couple of stitches at the side. Kids Size - Approx Age 4-10, see photos for comparison. 20 x 8cm Accessories Additional filters available to buy separately Silicone mask extender also available Use For Public transport, travel, airports and airplane, shopping, work, school, hair appointments, social situations. Meets WHO requirements Suitable for casual, professional and corporate face mask and face covering. Plain face mask for office and conferences and commuting. Anywhere that a face covering is required. Use With Glasses Ensure the mask is fitted against your face. Sits the mask under the frame of the glasses to prevent fogging. Please Note This is not a medical or surgical face mask and is therefore not considered PPE. This triple layer mask will provide excellent protection when used properly. The filters provide a much higher level of protection and are highly recommended. Washing Instructions Machine washable with the rest of your laundry. Full instructions included. Legal Disclaimer These masks are non medical and do not fall under PPE. Please see information leaflet for further advice and warnings.
